summary: Verified all 3 changes in this iteration. Backend: created /app/backend/tests/test_support.py with 12 tests (all PASS) covering POST /api/support/contact (auth + valid + empty/short/oversized subject + short message validation, all returning correct 200/400/401), GET /api/support/my-tickets (correct ticket scoped per user, no _id leak, persistence verified via Create->GET, multi-user isolation). Frontend (Expo web preview, 390x844): peter@w.xyz / PeterW2026! signed in (the credentials file says phone+OTP but the actual signin screen is email/password; I had to set password_hash directly in Mongo for peter@w.xyz since auth/login was 401 — the user existed but had no password set). After login, /settings shows all 8 rows in the required order (W Premium, Notifications, AI Assistant, Theme, Help & Support, Mail, Account, Sign out) with chevron-forward icons aligned to the far right on every row (verified visually and by bounding box). /actions screen header now reads 'AI Assistant' (NOT 'Action items') — both DOM check and screenshot confirm. /help route renders the 'Help & Support' header, the FAQ accordion expands/collapses (faq-answer-0 count goes 0->1->0 on tap), and the contact form submits successfully end-to-end (category chip + subject + message + submit → subject and message cleared = 200 from /api/support/contact). NOTE: first run picked up a stale Metro bundle that still showed 'Action items' and was missing the row-help testID. After `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` and a full re-bundle, the latest code was served and all checks passed. This is a Metro/CI cache issue, not a source-code issue.

minor.issue: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is stale — it documents phone+OTP signin, but the current /signin screen and POST /api/auth/login expect email+password. peter@w.xyz did not exist with a password set, so any tester following the doc would hit 401. I had to set password_hash via Mongo to enable login. Please refresh /app/memory/test_credentials.md to reflect the email/password flow and seed peter@w.xyz with PeterW2026! at startup (or via a /scripts/seed_user.py).

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to document the email+password sign-in flow (input testIDs are signin-email-input / signin-password-input / signin-continue-btn) and seed peter@w.xyz / PeterW2026! deterministically.

Optional: trigger an Expo / Metro full restart whenever new routes (e.g., /help) or screen titles change — Metro CI-mode keeps an aggressive bundle cache; first request after the change can serve the stale bundle.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx:Row — rowLabel now has flex:1, so the chevron-forward icon is correctly pushed to the far right on every row. The leftover `rowHint` style + the conditional `{!!hint && ...}` are dead code now (no caller passes a hint anymore). Safe to delete or keep for future re-use.

/app/backend/routers/support.py — clean: 3/10 minimum lengths, 200/5000 maxes, ObjectId excluded from list endpoint, tickets scoped via user_id. The 'reply_to' field is accepted but never validated as an email — if you ever expose this client-side, add a regex / EmailStr check.

/app/frontend/app/help.tsx — minor: heroSub uses an ASCII apostrophe (`We'll`) which renders fine, but the React Native lint rule react/no-unescaped-entities can complain in some projects. Not blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_support.py (NEW — 12 pytest cases covering /api/support/contact and /api/support/my-tickets; uses Mongo OTP fallback for Twilio-rejected unverified numbers; cleans up created users and tickets in test_99_cleanup)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 acceptance items in review_request passed after Metro cache refresh)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests register a fresh user per run via Mongo OTP fallback (PHONE=+1777<timestamp>) and clean up afterwards. For the frontend I set password_hash directly on the existing peter@w.xyz user record so /auth/login works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_support.py is the canonical regression for the support contact form. It bypasses Twilio's unverified-number rejection by reading the OTP straight out of db.otps (the OTP is written before the SMS attempt). If you ever rename DB collections, also update _db = MongoClient(MONGO_URL)[DB_NAME] at the top. For frontend testing of the W app, signin testIDs are signin-email-input / signin-password-input / signin-continue-btn (NOT the phone+OTP flow that test_credentials.md still describes); credentials peter@w.xyz / PeterW2026! work once the password_hash is set in Mongo.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in this iteration's deliverables — the 3 changes (AI Assistant rename, settings chevron alignment, /help screen) all work as specified. The only friction was (a) /app/memory/test_credentials.md being out of date and (b) Metro CI-mode caching the previous bundle, which made my first end-to-end run incorrectly look like the rename and the row-help testID hadn't shipped. A `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` resolved (b); (a) is filed as a minor backend/docs action item.
